title: Add the referenced documents to the issue
description: Inside the issue drawer we would like to see the documents (in the /docs folder) that are referenced. Also what would be cool is to have some real time progress description or progress display on it. Maybe through checklist meta, or through some updater to make sure it keeps track of what it's doing. So that you have transparency in what it's doing, which files are changed inside the commit/task etc.
